title: Course: COSC 110 - Introduction to Computing
description: Introduces students with no prior computing experience to digital computer organization and characteristics. Covers everyday computer uses and may include electronic mail and programming in a high-level language.
content:
COSC 110 - Introduction to Computing
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: None
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Introduces students with no prior computing experience to digital computer organization and characteristics. Covers everyday computer uses and may include electronic mail and programming in a high-level language.

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55564
